# RavenDOS — Intelligence, Architected.

> RavenDOS is a product-driven technology studio based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We design, develop, and launch intelligent platforms across AI/ML, DevOps, app development, website design, and network security.

## Services

- AI & Machine Learning Development: Custom ML models, NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics, MLOps pipelines
- DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure: CI/CD pipelines, AWS/Azure/GCP, Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code, monitoring
- App Development: Cross-platform mobile apps (React Native, Flutter), web apps (Next.js, React, Node.js), backend APIs
- Website Design & Development: Custom websites, responsive design, SEO optimization, e-commerce, landing pages
- Network & Cyber Security: Secure architecture, penetration testing, firewall management, zero-trust, compliance (ISO 27001, SOC 2)

## Products

- IntiGrade (https://intigrade.in): AI-powered exam evaluation that bridges pen-and-paper tests with digital grading
- DiagnosticWale (https://diagnosticwale.com): India's trusted diagnostic platform connecting patients with labs

## Location

Hyderabad, Telangana 500059, India
